name: curriculum progress: a curriculum phase studied in the ledger is marked studied
command:
printf '%s\n' '{"state":"learned","pillar":"security","curriculum_phase":"5"}' > led.jsonl
bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/curriculum-progress.sh" --ledger led.jsonl --out-dir out --now 2026-06-08T12:00:00Z 2>/dev/null
node -e 'const j=JSON.parse(require("fs").readFileSync("out/2026-06-08T120000Z.json","utf8"));process.exit(j.phase_coverage.find(p=>p.phase==="5").studied===true?0:1)' && echo phase5-studied 1>&2
